noticeItems.refund: Refund will be processed within 7-10 working days after cancellation approval.

footer.cancelTerm1: 60+ days before event: up to 90% refund
footer.cancelTerm2: 30–59 days before event: up to 80% refund
footer.cancelTerm3: 7–29 days before event: up to 50% refund
footer.cancelTerm4: Less than 7 days: no rent refund (security deposit as per rules)
